name: AntiVirus_snake
short_description: Welcome to "AntiVirus_snake" where you play as a cyber snake fighting computer viruses on computers. You will have to pass exciting levels with interesting tasks in order to remove all viruses from the computer.
detailed_description: Dr. Danil developed an anti-virus snake to help clean the computers of Danil's clients from viruses. You will play as that very antivirus snake. In the game you have to go through various obstacles and neutralize the soldiers of the virus. It is necessary to interact with the mechanisms on the locations in order to move through the location, it is also necessary to build up the cyber snake so that it can open access to the next task. The player should use the environment of the level to the maximum so as not to die and not to relax and think over their actions.
